text: If you run state machines on a paxos group, you get immortality despite distributed systems failures. (How a component of Spanner works)

text: Hello everyone! I'm curious in the sense of "thinking together"   regarding this happening in the rust community: <https://twitter.com/etorreborre/status/1463422189080915969?s=20> what are you throughts in it? Why is it happening  within the rust community and more general? How much are programming languages influenced in terms of communicating culture by things like the culture wars? Looking forward to your thoughts

what are you throughts in it? Why is it happening  within the rust community and more general? How much are programming languages influenced in terms of communicating culture by things like the culture wars? Looking forward to your thoughts

text:
Thanks everyone for those welcoming waves :wink: :man-surfing:

I guess I will say a word or two about the project, other than getting the “vibe” from the teaser…

This project represents an attempt to work around the fact that our de facto window onto *the network* of people and information is a passive media consumption device -- the web browser (it’s great and all but that’s what it is in it’s current/historical form).

What I’m after is a visual and interactive tool that is also an evolving information system.

There is a bit of ZUIs, a touch of Smalltalk spirit, more than a sprinkling of various hypertext ideas, full text search, planning and automation etc all written in Clojure / Clojurescript.

text:
My 2¢:
> what are you throughts in it?
> 
That's it's kind of pointless to conjecture any useful thoughts around it given that the actual details of what happened to prompt this haven't been shared publicly. Those who are seem to mostly be using it as a soapbox to espouse some pre-established opinion.
> Why is it happening within the rust community and more general?
> 
Because squabbles over governance and control happen in every community, always have and probably always will. We're a species with a deep seated desire/need to establish social hierarchies and that shows up in every group.
